# Openstrap

Openstrap connects OpenAI and diverse technologies to build user-centered applications.

Website:
https://www.openstrap.net

Main Service:
Weekboard

Weekboard is a goal execution management service that helps users turn weekly goals into daily action plans they can actually execute.

Key Features:
- Weekly goal-based planning
- Daily action plan distribution
- Goal execution reminders
- Progress tracking
- AI goal planning support
- Cross-device sync
